purpose: V_phen_GWT_v2 backbone-baseline-relative criterion 위한 baseline registry. r8 expansion: gemma-2-2b + Qwen2.5-1.5B 추가 (11 successful 2026-04-26). F2 hypothesis ('same family different size = different attention regime') 결정적 PARTIAL 검증.
revision: r8: 11/11 backbones COMPLETE. F2 falsifier dual measurement — gemma-2-2b GWT=0.3443 LOW (vs gemma-2-9b 0.8288 HIGH, Δ=0.485 ✅ size-dependent) + Qwen2.5-1.5B GWT=0.3324 LOW (vs Qwen2.5-7B 0.3635 LOW, Δ=0.031 ❌ NOT size-dependent). r7 F2 hypothesis가 architecture-conditional로 강화: Phi-3/gemma family에서는 size-dependent regime transition, Qwen family에서는 size-independent LOW-stable.
predecessor_revisions_chain: r1 (3) → r2 (4 +gemma-9b) → r3 (5 +Llama mirror) → r4 (Meta direct VERIFIED) → r5 (7 +Phi-3-medium +Yi) → r6 (8 +DeepSeek torch 2.8 fix) → r7 (9 +Phi-3-mini-4k) → r8 (11 +gemma-2-2b +Qwen2.5-1.5B F2 falsifier)
auto_approval_source: memory feedback_forward_auto_approval (2026-04-25), F2 falsifier 동시 dual launch (2 H100 SXM, 5min wallclock, ~$0.20)

Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B.measured_2026_04_26_r8: F2 falsifier #2, Qwen2.5 family small variant — Δ vs Qwen2.5-7B = +0.031 (NOT size-dependent), 25.7s forward, broadcast=1/28

google/gemma-2-2b.measured_2026_04_26_r8: F2 falsifier #1, gemma family small variant — Δ vs gemma-2-9b = +0.485 (✅ size-dependent regime transition), 25.8s forward, broadcast=0/26

aggregate_11_backbones_r8.cluster_separation_strength: high cluster std=0.036 vs low cluster std=0.070 — high cluster much tighter (5 architectures Mistral/gemma-9b/Phi-3-medium/Yi/DeepSeek 동일 broad-attention regime). low cluster 6 members 확장으로 std slightly tighter (0.078 → 0.070, 추가 small models가 LOW mean 근처에 fit). r7 → r8: cluster ratio 3.36 → 3.07 (slightly weaker due to LOW mean 상승).
aggregate_11_backbones_r8.size_distribution: LOW cluster size range = 1.5B - 8B (mean 4.6B). HIGH cluster size range = 7B - 14B (mean 9.2B). 7B는 양 cluster 모두 등장 (Mistral HIGH, Qwen2.5/DeepSeek mixed) — size-only 분류 불가, architecture × size joint determinant.
aggregate_11_backbones_r8.raw10_finding_r8: 11/11 backbones complete. **F2 hypothesis 결정적 PARTIAL 검증**: Phi-3 family (mini 3.8B LOW vs medium 14B HIGH, Δ=0.633) + gemma family (2B LOW vs 9B HIGH, Δ=0.485) 둘은 size-dependent regime transition. Qwen2.5 family (1.5B LOW vs 7B LOW, Δ=0.031) 는 NOT size-dependent (LOW-stable across sizes). 강화된 hypothesis: 'attention entropy regime은 architecture base + family-specific size threshold' — 일부 architectures는 size threshold 존재 (gemma는 9B 즈음, Phi-3는 mini-medium 사이), 일부는 LOW-only (Qwen).

F2_hypothesis_evidence_r8.F2_v1_r7: 'same family different size = different attention regime' — Phi-3 family 단 1 family evidence
F2_hypothesis_evidence_r8.F2_v2_r8_REFINED: 'attention entropy regime은 architecture base + family-specific size threshold'

evidence_against_F2.verdict: size-INDEPENDENT (LOW-stable, no transition observed up to 7B)

F2_hypothesis_evidence_r8.verdict: F2 v2 PARTIAL — Phi-3 + gemma confirm, Qwen2.5 falsifies size-only generalization. Architecture-conditional size threshold required.
next_falsifiers: Qwen2.5-72B 측정 — Qwen family size threshold 존재 여부 (7B → 72B에서 HIGH transition?)
Llama-3.1-70B 측정 — Llama family size threshold (8B LOW → 70B ?)
Mistral-Small (24B) 또는 Mixtral-8x7B — Mistral family 7B HIGH로 시작, 더 큰 size에서 같은 regime?

V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.threshold_history: r1=0.558 → r2=0.638 → r3=0.555 → r5=0.667 → r6=0.707 → r7=0.662 → r8=0.613. registry expansion에 따라 LOW cluster mean 상승 (3.8B → 1.5B/2B small models 추가) → global threshold 하향 trend. **per-backbone PASS criterion 권장 강화 (r8 strongest)**.
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.use_case: Mk.XI fine-tuned model이 11 backbones 평균 baseline + 0.05 = 0.6126 이상 → V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS

V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.backbone_specific_alternative: (권장) per-backbone PASS = post_tune >= backbone_baseline + 0.05. cluster-aware: LOW threshold 0.34, HIGH threshold 0.94.

raw10_honest_findings_r8.F1_bimodal_distribution_PERSISTENT: 11 backbones bimodal 확정 — Low cluster (6 models, mean 0.290) vs High cluster (5 models, mean 0.890). 두 cluster 간 격차 0.600 (3.07x). r7 (3.36) 대비 separation slightly weaker (LOW cluster expansion).
raw10_honest_findings_r8.F2_v2_REFINED_partial_verification: **핵심 finding (r8 신규)**: F2 v1 'size-dependent regime' 가설 PARTIAL 검증. Phi-3/gemma family 확정, Qwen family 반증. Architecture-conditional size threshold가 정확한 모델. evidence_for_F2 + evidence_against_F2 양쪽 raw#10 honest 명시.
raw10_honest_findings_r8.F3_threshold_oscillation_continues: r1=0.558 → r6=0.707 → r7=0.662 → r8=0.613. 추가 LOW small models가 global mean 하향 trend. global-mean threshold는 cluster size + small-model coverage에 민감 — **per-backbone PASS criterion이 정합적**.
raw10_honest_findings_r8.F4_high_cluster_tightness_PERSISTENT: high cluster 5 members std 0.036, low cluster 6 members std 0.070. 추가 small models (gemma-2b, Qwen2.5-1.5B)가 LOW cluster의 일관된 'sparse/focused attention regime' member로 fit (균일한 spread, no outliers).
raw10_honest_findings_r8.F5_v2_threshold_PRODUCTION_TAG: 11/11 도달 + F2 hypothesis falsifier-test 완료 + bimodal robust + per-backbone PASS spec 강화 → v2 spec PROMOTE: production-readiness with caveats. global-mean (loose, cluster-balance dependent) vs per-backbone (strict, recommended) vs cluster-aware (LOW/HIGH separated thresholds) 3개 spec 병존, 사용처에 따라 선택.
raw10_honest_findings_r8.F6_F2_falsifier_method_validated: 동시 dual-launch H100 (gemma-2-2b + Qwen2.5-1.5B) 5min wallclock $0.20 → architecture-conditional size threshold finding. orchestration mechanism이 multi-backbone parallel measurement에 적합 — 후속 F2 falsifiers (Llama-3.1-70B, Qwen2.5-72B, Mixtral) 동일 path 즉시 적용 가능.
